phases.title: PHASE 1: Java Fundamentals
phases.description: Learn basic structure, installation, variables, and flow controls.

phases.title: PHASE 2: Flow Control & Memory
phases.description: Methods, recursion, arrays, and string pools.

phases.title: PHASE 3: Object Oriented Programming (OOP)
phases.description: Classes, objects, inheritance, interfaces, and enums.

phases.title: PHASE 4: Exception Flow & Collections
phases.description: Exception handling, file I/O, and the Collections Framework.

phases.title: PHASE 5: Threading & Modern Java Features
phases.description: Multithreading, Lambdas, Streams API, and Date-Time.

phases.title: PHASE 6: Database Connectivity (JDBC)
phases.description: SQL drivers, CRUD, PreparedStatements, and transactions.

phases.title: PHASE 7: Industrial Mini Projects
phases.description: Write desktop applications and design transactional engines.

phases.title: PHASE 8: SOLID & Design Patterns
phases.description: Singleton, Factory, Builder, MVC, and clean design patterns.

phases.title: PHASE 9: Placements & Interview Preparation
phases.description: Crack tricky coding scenarios and standard HR questions.

phases.title: PHASE 10: Advanced Frameworks
phases.description: Servlets, Maven, Spring Core, Spring Boot, and Microservices.

phases.title: JS Core Runtimes
phases.description: Call Stack, Event Loop, Scope Chains, closures.

phases.title: PHASE 1: SQL Fundamentals (Days 1–10)
phases.description: Learn databases, constraints, CRUD, operators, aggregates and grouping.

phases.title: PHASE 2: Joins (Days 11–20)
phases.description: Inner, Left, Right, Full, Cross, Self Joins and Business Use Cases.

phases.title: PHASE 3: Intermediate SQL (Days 21–35)
phases.description: Subqueries, CTEs, CASE statements, COALESCE, Views, and Indexes.

phases.title: PHASE 4: Functions (Days 36–50)
phases.description: String, Numeric, Date, and Type Conversion Functions.

phases.title: PHASE 5: Window Functions (Days 51–60)
phases.description: Rank, Dense Rank, Row Number, Lead, Lag, partition and sliding frames.

phases.title: PHASE 6: CTE & Advanced SQL (Days 61–70)
phases.description: Recursive CTEs, Temp Tables, Stored Procedures, Triggers, and Transactions.

phases.title: PHASE 7: SQL for Data Analytics (Days 71–80)
phases.description: KPIs, Segmentation, Retention, Cohort, Churn, and Moving Averages.

phases.title: PHASE 8: SQL Optimization (Days 81–85)
phases.description: Explain plans, indexes, composite keys, normalizations, and tuning.

phases.title: PHASE 9: SQL Projects (Days 86–90)
phases.description: Sales dashboards, Netflix datasets, Amazon sales analysis, and HR analytics.

day_1.title: Introduction to Databases, DBMS vs RDBMS, SQL Overview & Commands

day_2.title: Data Types & Constraints (Primary Key, Foreign Key, Check, Unique)

day_5.title: DQL Basics (SELECT, DISTINCT, LIMIT, ORDER BY)

day_6.title: Filtering Data (WHERE, BETWEEN, IN, LIKE, IS NULL, Logical Operators)

day_8.title: Aggregate Functions (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX)

day_56.title: SUM OVER() & AVG OVER() Cumulative Aggregates
